title: Income
description: How to complete income sections of your tax return using myTax.

child_links.title: Salary, wages or other income on an income statement or payment summary
child_links.description: How to complete myTax if you have salary, wages, ETPs, Government payments or First home super saver income.

child_links.title: Australian super or annuity payments
child_links.description: How to complete myTax if you have annuities, super income streams or super lump sums.

child_links.title: Australian income or losses from investments or property
child_links.description: How to complete myTax if you have interest, dividends, capital gains or rent.

child_links.title: Managed fund or trust distributions
child_links.description: How to complete myTax if you have managed fund or trust distributions.

child_links.title: Sole trader and business income or losses and partnership distributions
child_links.description: How to complete myTax if you have business/sole trader, partnership or personal services income.

child_links.title: Foreign income
child_links.description: How to complete myTax if you have foreign employment, pensions, annuities, foreign entities or other foreign income.

child_links.title: Other income
child_links.description: How to complete myTax if you have other income, including employee share schemes.

child_links.title: Amounts that you do not pay tax on
child_links.description: How to know which amounts you do not pay tax on when you lodge your return using myTax.
